/* menuicon-btn
------------------------------------------------------------ */
.tm1_pt1 .menu-icon-before {
  position: relative;
  display: none;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  z-index: 110;
  transition: all .4s;
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  border-radius: 100%;
  background: #1EA7A2;
}
.tm1_pt1 .menu-icon-before span {
  position: relative;
  display: block;
  width: 18px;
  height: 2px;
  background: #fff;
  transition: all .4s;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.tm1_pt1 .menu-icon-before span:nth-of-type(1) {
  top:-4px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .menu-icon-before span:nth-of-type(3) {
  top: 4px;
}
.tm1_pt1 .menu-icon-before.active span:nth-of-type(1) {
  top: 1px;
  transform: rotate(45deg);
}
.tm1_pt1 .menu-icon-before.active span:nth-of-type(2) {
  display: none;
}
.tm1_pt1 .menu-icon-before.active span:nth-of-type(3) {
  top: -1px;
  transform: rotate(-45deg);
}
.tm1_pt1 .menu-txt {

.tm1_pt1 .fade-nav {
  position: fixed;
  top: 64px;
  right: -100vw;
  width: 100%;

  background-color: #1EA7A2;

  transition: all .4s ease-in-out;

  overflow-x: hidden;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  padding: 0 0 196px;
  z-index: 100;
}
.tm1_pt1 .fade-nav.js-open {
  right: 0;
}

.tm1_pt1 .fade-nav.open-type-left {
  left: -100vw;

}

}
.tm1_pt1 .fade-nav.open-type-top-left {

  right: auto;
}
.tm1_pt1 .fade-nav.open-type-full {

  right: 0;

}

}

}

<br />
市場のニーズは今まで以上に変化し、多様性を極めており、既存事業の枠にはまっていては近く限界が訪れます。5年後10年後またその先もお客様に必要とされる企業であり続けるため、当社は自由な発想と行動力で新製品、新市場へ挑戦し、これからも成長してまいります。</div>

        $(".js-nav-overlay").stop(true).fadeIn();
      } else {
        $(fadenav).fadeIn();
      }
      bodyFix();
    } else {
      $(this).removeClass("active");
      $(fadenav).removeClass("js-open");
      $(fadenav).addClass("js-close");
      if (!$(fadenav).hasClass("open-type-full")) {
        $(".js-nav-overlay").stop(true).fadeOut();
      } else {
        $(fadenav).fadeOut();
      }
      bodyFixReset();
    }
  });

  $(".js-nav-overlay").on("click", function() {
    $(".menu-icon-before").removeClass("active");
    $(fadenav).removeClass("js-open");
    $(fadenav).addClass("js-close");
    $(".js-nav-overlay").stop(true).fadeOut();
    bodyFixReset();
  });

  var scrollPosition;
  function bodyFix() {
    scrollPosition = $(window).scrollTop();
    $("body").css({
      "position": "fixed",
      "width": "100%",
      "z-index": "1",
      "top": -scrollPosition
    }).addClass("fixed");
//    $(".page-header").css({
//      "top": 0
//    });
  }

  //body fix���Z�b�g
  function bodyFixReset() {
    $("body").removeAttr('style').removeClass("fixed");
    $("html, body").scrollTop(scrollPosition);
//    $(".page-header").css("top","");
  }

$(function() {
  $("body").css("position", "static");
  if(sessionStorage.getItem('access')) {
    $(".loading").hide();
    $("body").css("position", "static");
  } else {
    $(".loading-inner").animate({
      "opacity": "1"
    }, 1000, function() {
      var self = $(".loading-count span"),
      countMax = self.attr('data-num'),
      thisCount = self.text(),
      countTimer;
      function timer() {
        countTimer = setInterval(function() {
          var countNext = thisCount++;
          self.text(countNext);
          if(countNext == countMax) {
            clearInterval(countTimer);
            $('.loading-count').animate({
              "opacity": "0"
            }, 1500);
            setTimeout(function() {
              $(".loading").fadeOut();
              $("body").css("position", "static");
            }, 500);
          }
        }, 30);
      }
      timer();
    });
    sessionStorage.setItem('access', 0);
  }
});

$(function () {
  $(window).scroll(function () {
    const wHeight = $(window).height();
    const scrollAmount = $(window).scrollTop();
    let buffer;
    if ($(window).width() > 767) {
      buffer = 100;
    } else {
      buffer = 50;
    }
    // ここまで追加
    $('.story-item').each(function () {
      const targetPosition = $(this).offset().top;
      if (scrollAmount > targetPosition - wHeight + buffer) {
        $(this).addClass("is-fadein");
      }
    });
  });
});
